urdu transliteration text:
Khudaya aj ki ye majlise Shaadi Mubarak Ho
Or Dulha or Dulhanko bhi ye shaadi Mubarak Ho
english translation text:
Oh Lord, Bless This Gathering For The Wedding
Congratulations To The Bride And Groom

urdu transliteration text:
Sada ho unke sar par chadare tatheer ka saya
Dua ho Fatema Ki Sab hi kushiya bhi bhi Mubarak ho
english translation text:
They Should Have The Shadow Of The Divine Cloak (CHADAR-E-TATHEER) Forever
They Should Stay With The Duaa And Blessings Of Bibi Fatima

urdu transliteration text:
Khudaya aj ki ye majlise Shaadi Mubarak Ho
Or Dulha or Dulhanko bhi ye shaadi Mubarak Ho
english translation text:
Oh Lord, Bless This Gathering For The Wedding
Congratulations To The Bride And Groom

urdu transliteration text:
Dulhan Ke Sarpe Rakhte Haath Ye Maa Baap Kehte Hai
Quran Ke Saayaame Rehna Tuje Shaadi Mubarak Ho
english translation text:
The Bride’s Parents Put Their Hands On Her Head
They Say: Stay In The Shadow Of The Holy Quran, Congratulations On Your Wedding

urdu transliteration text:
Khudaya aj ki ye majlise Shaadi Mubarak Ho
Or Dulha or Dulhanko bhi ye shaadi Mubarak Ho
english translation text:
Oh Lord, Bless This Gathering For The Wedding
Congratulations To The Bride And Groom

urdu transliteration text:
Hamari Ye Dua Hai Ke Rahe Taza Chaman Tera
Bar Aye Dilki Umide Tuje Shaadi Mubarak Ho
Fulfil All Your Heartiest Wishes On This Blessed Wedding
english translation text: It Is Our Prayers That Your Garden Stay Always Fresh And Green

urdu transliteration text:
Khudaya aj ki ye majlise Shaadi Mubarak Ho
Or Dulha or Dulhanko bhi ye shaadi Mubarak Ho
english translation text:
Oh Lord, Bless This Gathering For The Wedding
Congratulations To The Bride And Groom

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Muhammad Nam Pyara, Arsh Par Hakne Pukara
Sach Payambar Hai Hamara, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text:
Oh Muhammad Your Name Is Beautiful
Your Were Called Upon To The Throne Of God
Our Messenger Is The Truthful
Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Habibe Kibriya Ho, Tum Shafie Do Jaha Ho
Tum Hamare Peshewa Ho, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text:
You Are The Greatest Friend
You The Intercessor Of This World And Hereafter
You Are Our Divine Leader
Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Fakhre Adam Or Musa, Fakhre Nuh Or Fakhre Isa,
Na Hai Kai Aur Na Hoga, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text:
You Are The Pride Of Adam And Musa (Moses)
You Are The Pride Of Nuh (Noah) And Isa (Jesus)
No One Is Like You And No One Will Ever Be
Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Tum He Arsh Par Bulaya, Tumhe Raz Sab Bataya,
Na Koyi Tumhara Jaisa, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text:
Allah Invited You To His Throne
Allah Gave You All The Secrets
No One Is Like You
Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Hashre Me Jab Ke Tum Ana, To Hame Na Bhul Jana
Hamko Dozak Se Bhachana, Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text:
When You Come On The Day Of Judgement,
Do Not Forget Us
Save Us From Hell (Purgatory),
The Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Nabi Salaam Alayka, Ya Rasul Salaam Alayka
Ya Habib Salaam Alayka Salawatullah Alayka
english translation text: Oh Prophet, Peace Be Upon YouOh Messenger, Peace Be Upon YouOh Beloved, Peace Be Upon YouThe Blessings Of Allah Be Upon You
